% Project metadata
\newcommand{\MatterTitle}{man debate}
\newcommand{\MatterSubtitle}{BP debating matter file}
\newcommand{\MatterVersion}{0.1.0}
\newcommand{\MatterDate}{\today}

% Build info is generated by Makefile into src/buildinfo.tex and may override
% \MatterVersion / \MatterDate and define \BuildShortSha, \PrintSpec, \RepoURL
\IfFileExists{src/buildinfo.tex}{\input{src/buildinfo.tex}}{}

% This is dynamically set by content blocks.
\newcommand{\CurrentCredit}{}
\newcommand{\setcredit}[1]{\renewcommand{\CurrentCredit}{#1}}

% Tab label shown in the margin/running header for print assembly.
\newcommand{\CurrentTabLabel}{}
\newcommand{\settablabel}[1]{%
	\renewcommand{\CurrentTabLabel}{#1}%
}
